verification.checks_note: Surviving hypotheses are unresolved candidates, not failed tests; dynamic induction is required before calling them defects.

limitations: Hypotheses require module 3 verification; parser candidates may receive isolated induction, while unsupported families remain AST-only.

quality.evidence_completeness_note: Requires an explicit obligation ledger mapping each executed contract obligation to satisfied or missing Evidence items.
quality.verification_coverage_note: Requires a count of planned checks versus checks actually executed, including skipped checks and their reasons.
